problem id: 069dbaab
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) AND SHL(2)

examples:
  01110111 -> 11011100
  10000101 -> 00000000
  10110111 -> 11001100
  10000100 -> 00000000
  00110010 -> 10001000
  01101010 -> 10001000
  10000000 -> 00000000
  10100010 -> 10001000
  00110000 -> 00000000
  10100000 -> 00000000

query: 11000111
predicted answer: 00010000
